name: TEMP.Zagros
akas: MUDDYCOAST, MuddyWater, Mango Sandstorm, Static Kitten, Seedworm (Iran)
brief: Used Gemini to research and support development of custom malware (a Python C2 server and web shells) — an evolution in the group's capability — using social-engineering pretexts (posing as a student on a final-year project or a paper author) to bypass Gemini's safety guardrails. GTIG
ttpMd:
**LLM-aided development** T1587.001 - Develop Capabilities: Malware

T1505.003 - Server Software Component: Web Shell
